projectDescription: A self-hosted Discord bot that bridges text and voice channels between Discord and Fluxer communities.
keyFeatures: Bidirectional text message bridging between Discord and Fluxer channels
Voice channel bridging (alpha) using LiveKit and WebSocket runners
Edit, delete, and bulk-delete bridging across platforms
Reply and embed bridging with cross-platform formatting
Flexible bridge direction: both, discord-to-fluxer, or fluxer-to-discord
Webhook-based message routing with SQLite persistence
publicApiSurface: fc!setup [code|direction] — initiate or complete a bridge setup
fc!verify — approve a pending bridge request
fc!unbridge — remove a bridge from the current channel
fc!guild seterrorlogging <channelId> — set an error logging channel
fc!guild seterrorreaction <emoji> — set the error reaction emoji
